gold: Şu an itibari ile yok, teşekkür ederim.
werNormalizedGold: şu an itibari ile yok teşekkür ederim
sigWerNormalizedGold: şu an itibari ile yok teşekkür ederim

sigWerErrors.reason: 'şu' (now/this) and 'şuan' (right now/at this moment) are very close in meaning and often used interchangeably in Turkish, so this is a minor error.
'itibari ile yok' means 'as of now, there is none', while 'imkansız' means 'impossible'. This substitution changes the meaning significantly.
'ederim' (I do/I thank) and 'ediyorum' (I am doing/I am thanking) are different tenses but the meaning in context is the same, so this is a minor error.
